name: rss
description: RSS/Atom feeds as digest sources; feed XML is distilled in the sandbox (C6)
config_hints: add feed URLs to skills/rss/SKILL.md (one https URL per line under Sources)
each feed host needs a broker route: rerun `aegis-setup connector add rss` after editing connectors/rss/connector.json, or copy the mcp-example block in deploy/broker/envoy.yaml
